notes: Node 2:21 is the A3Data Identity / DataViz manual. It documents brand, color, typography, iconography and chart patterns rather than an interactive UI component library. Items below reflect the visual patterns actually present in the manual. UI-app components (buttons, forms, modals) are not defined here.

variants.name: Variações
variants.note: Exact variation list/specs not enumerated in extracted text.

rules: Use only the original brand files.
Do not alter, add to, or recreate the drawing or typography of the mark.

iconography.style_observed: Stroke / Regular weight (from component metadata 'Format=Stroke, Weight=Regular')
iconography.note: Hundreds of Phosphor icon component sets are present in the file (communication, weather, maps, media, finance, people, security, education, etc.).

kpi_cards.note: Card title/value typography is defined; explicit interaction states (hover/selected) are not declared.

buttons.note: No button component is defined in node 2:21 (identity/DataViz manual). The button instance seen in node 2731:3414 belongs to a different page and is not the source for this round.

forms.note: No form components defined in the identity manual.

navigation.note: No navigation components defined in the identity manual.

badges.note: No badge/tag components defined in the identity manual.

modals.note: No modal/overlay components defined in the identity manual.

radius.note: No named radius tokens are declared in the identity manual. Card/chart corner radii observed elsewhere (8/12/16px) come from other pages and are not authoritative for node 2:21.

shadows.note: No elevation/shadow tokens are declared in the identity manual.
